# Rekt Wrapped Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** Build a monthly cinematic slide-deck recap for Pro wallets — generated by cron on the 1st of each month, publicly shareable, notified via Telegram DM.

**Architecture:** A `generateWrapped` function extends the existing audit pipeline with month-scoped Helius pagination, stores a permanent Redis snapshot per wallet per month, and is invoked by a new cron route. The UI is a full-viewport story-slide component (`WrappedClient`) at `/wrapped/[wallet]/[YYYY-MM]`.

**Tech Stack:** Next.js 15 App Router, TypeScript, Upstash Redis, Helius API, Tailwind CSS, `requestAnimationFrame` for animations.

---

| File | Action | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `lib/redis/keys.ts` | Modify | Add `wrapped`, `wrappedLatest`, `proWallets` keys |
| `lib/pro.ts` | Modify | Maintain `proWallets` set on grant/revoke |
| `lib/helius.ts` | Modify | Extract `mapHeliusTx` helper; add `fetchSwapTransactionsByMonth` |
| `lib/wrapped.ts` | Create | `generateWrapped` — core snapshot logic |
| `lib/helius.ts` test | Modify | Test for `fetchSwapTransactionsByMonth` |
| `lib/wrapped.ts` test | Create | Test for `generateWrapped` |
| `app/api/cron/generate-wrapped/route.ts` | Create | Month-end cron — generate all Pro wallets + Telegram DM |
| `vercel.json` | Modify | Add cron schedule |
| `app/wrapped/[wallet]/page.tsx` | Create | Redirect to latest month |
| `app/wrapped/[wallet]/[month]/page.tsx` | Create | Server component — reads Redis, renders `WrappedClient` |
| `app/wrapped/[wallet]/[month]/WrappedClient.tsx` | Create | Full-viewport cinematic slide deck |

## Task 2: Pro wallet index

**Files:**

- [ ] **Step 1: Update `grantPro` to add wallet to the pro-wallets set**

Replace the `grantPro` function body:

```typescript
export async function grantPro(wallet: string, paymentRef: string, source: string): Promise<void> {
  await Promise.all([
    redis.set(KEYS.userPro(wallet), JSON.stringify({ plan: 'pro', paymentRef, source })),
    redis.sadd(KEYS.proWallets(), wallet),
  ]);
}
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Update `grantSignals` to add wallet to the set**

Replace the `grantSignals` function body:

```typescript
export async function grantSignals(wallet: string): Promise<void> {
  await Promise.all([
    redis.set(KEYS.userPro(wallet), JSON.stringify({ plan: 'signals', grantedAt: Date.now() })),
    redis.sadd(KEYS.proWallets(), wallet),
  ]);
}
```

- [ ] **Step 3: Update `revokePro` to remove wallet from the set**

Replace the `revokePro` function body:

```typescript
export async function revokePro(wallet: string): Promise<void> {
  await Promise.all([
    redis.del(KEYS.userPro(wallet)),
    redis.srem(KEYS.proWallets(), wallet),
  ]);
}
```

## Task 3: Month-scoped Helius fetch

**Files:**
- Modify: `lib/helius.ts`
- Modify: `lib/__tests__/helius.test.ts`

- [ ] **Step 1: Extract `mapHeliusTx` as a module-level helper in `lib/helius.ts`**

Add this function immediately before `fetchSwapTransactions` (around line 131). It extracts the inline mapping logic that currently lives inside `fetchSwapTransactions`:

```typescript
function mapHeliusTx(tx: HeliusEnhancedTransaction, walletAddress: string): SwapTransaction {
  const nativeTransfers = tx.nativeTransfers ?? [];
  const tokenTransfers = tx.tokenTransfers ?? [];

  const jitoTipLamports = nativeTransfers
    .filter((t) => JITO_TIP_ACCOUNTS.has(t.toUserAccount))
    .reduce((sum, t) => sum + t.amount, 0);
  const hasJitoTip = jitoTipLamports > 0;

  const outgoing = tokenTransfers
    .filter((t) => t.fromUserAccount === walletAddress)
    .reduce((max, t) => Math.max(max, t.tokenAmount), 0);
  const incoming = tokenTransfers
    .filter((t) => t.toUserAccount === walletAddress)
    .reduce((max, t) => Math.max(max, t.tokenAmount), 0);
  const slippagePct =
    outgoing > 0 && incoming > 0
      ? Math.max(0, ((outgoing - incoming) / outgoing) * 100)
      : 0;

  const likelySandwiched = hasJitoTip && jitoTipLamports > 100000;
  const accountData = tx.accountData ?? [];

  return {
    signature: tx.signature,
    timestamp: tx.timestamp,
    fee: tx.fee,
    hasJitoTip,
    jitoTipLamports,
    slippagePct,
    likelySandwiched,
    tokenTransfers,
    accountData,
    legs: extractLegs(walletAddress, tx.tokenTransfers ?? [], accountData, tx.fee, tx.timestamp),
  };
}
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Replace the inline map in `fetchSwapTransactions` with the helper**

Replace the `return txs.map((tx) => { ... });` block in `fetchSwapTransactions` with:

```typescript
  return txs.slice(0, MAX).map((tx) => mapHeliusTx(tx, walletAddress));
```

- [ ] **Step 3: Add `fetchSwapTransactionsByMonth` after `fetchSwapTransactions`**

```typescript
export async function fetchSwapTransactionsByMonth(
  walletAddress: string,
  year: number,
  month: number,
): Promise<SwapTransaction[]> {
  const apiKey = process.env.HELIUS_API_KEY;
  if (!apiKey) throw new Error('HELIUS_API_KEY is not set');

  const monthStart = Math.floor(Date.UTC(year, month - 1, 1) / 1000);
  const monthEnd = Math.floor(Date.UTC(year, month, 1) / 1000);

  const collected: HeliusEnhancedTransaction[] = [];
  let before: string | null = null;

  while (true) {
    const base = `https://api.helius.xyz/v0/addresses/${walletAddress}/transactions?api-key=${apiKey}&limit=100&type=SWAP`;
    const url = before ? `${base}&before=${before}` : base;

    const res = await fetch(url);
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Helius API error: ${res.status}`);
    const page: HeliusEnhancedTransaction[] = await res.json();
    if (page.length === 0) break;

    for (const tx of page) {
      if (tx.timestamp >= monthStart && tx.timestamp < monthEnd) {
        collected.push(tx);
      }
    }

    const oldestTs = page[page.length - 1].timestamp;
    if (oldestTs < monthStart || page.length < 100) break;
    before = page[page.length - 1].signature;
  }

  return collected.map((tx) => mapHeliusTx(tx, walletAddress));
}
```

- [ ] **Step 4: Write the failing test in `lib/__tests__/helius.test.ts`**

Add this describe block at the end of the file:

```typescript
describe('fetchSwapTransactionsByMonth', () => {
  it('returns only txs within the calendar month', async () => {
    // May 2026: monthStart = 1746057600, monthEnd = 1748736000
    const mayStart = Math.floor(Date.UTC(2026, 4, 1) / 1000);  // 1746057600
    const mayEnd   = Math.floor(Date.UTC(2026, 5, 1) / 1000);  // 1748736000

    const inMonth = { ...mockTxs[0], timestamp: mayStart + 1000 };
    const beforeMonth = { ...mockTxs[0], signature: 'before', timestamp: mayStart - 1 };
    const afterMonth  = { ...mockTxs[0], signature: 'after',  timestamp: mayEnd + 1 };

    global.fetch = jest.fn().mockResolvedValueOnce({
      ok: true,
      json: async () => [afterMonth, inMonth, beforeMonth],
    } as Response);

    const result = await fetchSwapTransactionsByMonth('walletA', 2026, 5);

    expect(result).toHaveLength(1);
    expect(result[0].signature).toBe(inMonth.signature);
    expect(result[0].timestamp).toBe(inMonth.timestamp);
  });

  it('stops paginating when oldest tx is before month start', async () => {
    const mayStart = Math.floor(Date.UTC(2026, 4, 1) / 1000);

    const page1 = Array.from({ length: 100 }, (_, i) => ({
      ...mockTxs[0],
      signature: `sig-p1-${i}`,
      timestamp: mayStart + (100 - i) * 100,
    }));
    const page2 = [{ ...mockTxs[0], signature: 'old', timestamp: mayStart - 500 }];

    global.fetch = jest.fn()
      .mockResolvedValueOnce({ ok: true, json: async () => page1 } as Response)
      .mockResolvedValueOnce({ ok: true, json: async () => page2 } as Response);

    await fetchSwapTransactionsByMonth('walletA', 2026, 5);

    expect(global.fetch).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(2);
  });
});
```

});

- [ ] **Step 3: Create `lib/wrapped.ts`**

```typescript
import { fetchSwapTransactionsByMonth } from './helius';
import { calculateLeakage, calculateTokenBreakdown } from './fees';
import { getDeadTokens } from './deadTokens';
import { getTokenMetadata } from './tokens';
import { getSolPriceAtTimestamp } from './price';
import { computeRektScore } from './rektScore';
import { getTraderPersonality } from './personality';
import { calculateGrade } from './auditWallet';
import { redis } from './redis';
import { KEYS } from './redis/keys';

export interface WrappedData {
  wallet: string;
  year: number;
  month: number;
  totalFeesUsd: number;
  grade: string;
  rektScore: number;
  swapCount: number;
  worstTrade: { symbol: string; mint: string; feeUsd: number; timestamp: number } | null;
  deadTokens: Array<{ mint: string; symbol: string }>;
  personality: { type: string; description: string };
  communityPercentile: number | null;
  generatedAt: number;
}

function dateKey(timestampSeconds: number): string {
  const d = new Date(timestampSeconds * 1000);
  const dd = String(d.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0');
  const mm = String(d.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
  return `${dd}-${mm}-${d.getUTCFullYear()}`;
}

export async function generateWrapped(
  wallet: string,
  year: number,
  month: number,
): Promise<WrappedData> {
  const txs = await fetchSwapTransactionsByMonth(wallet, year, month);

  const mints = [
    ...new Set(txs.flatMap((tx) => tx.tokenTransfers.map((t) => t.mint)).filter(Boolean)),
  ];

  const solPricesByDate = new Map<string, number>();
  await Promise.all(
    txs.map(async (tx) => {
      const key = dateKey(tx.timestamp);
      if (!solPricesByDate.has(key)) {
        solPricesByDate.set(key, await getSolPriceAtTimestamp(tx.timestamp * 1000));
      }
    }),
  );

  const [summary, tokenMetadata, deadTokensFull] = await Promise.all([
    calculateLeakage(txs),
    getTokenMetadata(mints),
    getDeadTokens(wallet).catch(() => []),
  ]);

  const tokenBreakdown = calculateTokenBreakdown(txs, tokenMetadata, solPricesByDate);
  const grade = calculateGrade(summary.totalLeakageUsd);

  const rektScore = computeRektScore({
    totalLeakageUsd: summary.totalLeakageUsd,
    transactionCount: summary.transactionCount,
    tokenBreakdown,
    overtrading: null,
    deadTokens: deadTokensFull,
  });

  const personality = getTraderPersonality({
    transactionCount: summary.transactionCount,
    totalLeakageUsd: summary.totalLeakageUsd,
    totalJitoTips: summary.totalJitoTips,
    grade,
  });

  // Find most expensive single swap by USD cost
  let worstTrade: WrappedData['worstTrade'] = null;
  let maxFeeUsd = 0;
  for (const tx of txs) {
    if (tx.legs.length === 0) continue;
    const solPrice = solPricesByDate.get(dateKey(tx.timestamp)) ?? 150;
    const feeUsd = ((tx.fee + tx.jitoTipLamports) / 1e9) * solPrice;
    if (feeUsd > maxFeeUsd) {
      maxFeeUsd = feeUsd;
      const leg = tx.legs[0];
      const symbol =
        tokenBreakdown.find((t) => t.mint === leg.mint)?.symbol ??
        `${leg.mint.slice(0, 4)}…`;
      worstTrade = { symbol, mint: leg.mint, feeUsd, timestamp: tx.timestamp };
    }
  }

  // Community percentile: what % of audited wallets have higher leakage
  let communityPercentile: number | null = null;
  const totalWallets = await redis.zcard(KEYS.lbGlobal());
  if (totalWallets >= 3) {
    // zrank returns 0-based index from lowest score; higher rank = more rekt
    const rank = await redis.zrank(KEYS.lbGlobal(), wallet);
    if (rank !== null) {
      communityPercentile = Math.round((rank / totalWallets) * 100);
    }
  }

  const result: WrappedData = {
    wallet,
    year,
    month,
    totalFeesUsd: summary.totalLeakageUsd,
    grade,
    rektScore: rektScore.score,
    swapCount: summary.transactionCount,
    worstTrade,
    deadTokens: deadTokensFull.map((t) => ({ mint: t.mint, symbol: t.symbol })),
    personality: { type: personality.title, description: personality.description },
    communityPercentile,
    generatedAt: Date.now(),
  };

  const yyyyMm = `${year}-${String(month).padStart(2, '0')}`;
  await Promise.all([
    redis.set(KEYS.wrapped(wallet, yyyyMm), JSON.stringify(result)),
    redis.set(KEYS.wrappedLatest(wallet), yyyyMm),
  ]);

  return result;
}
```

## Task 5: Cron route and vercel.json

**Files:**
- Create: `app/api/cron/generate-wrapped/route.ts`
- Modify: `vercel.json`

- [ ] **Step 1: Create `app/api/cron/generate-wrapped/route.ts`**

```typescript
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import { redis } from '@/lib/redis';
import { KEYS } from '@/lib/redis/keys';
import { generateWrapped } from '@/lib/wrapped';
import { getTelegramChatId, sendTelegramMessage } from '@/lib/telegram';

export async function GET(req: NextRequest): Promise<NextResponse> {
  const secret = req.headers.get('x-admin-secret');
  if (!secret || secret !== process.env.ADMIN_SECRET) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 });
  }

  const now = new Date();
  // Generate Wrapped for the just-completed month
  const year = now.getUTCMonth() === 0 ? now.getUTCFullYear() - 1 : now.getUTCFullYear();
  const month = now.getUTCMonth() === 0 ? 12 : now.getUTCMonth();
  const yyyyMm = `${year}-${String(month).padStart(2, '0')}`;
  const monthName = new Date(Date.UTC(year, month - 1, 1)).toLocaleString('en-US', {
    month: 'long',
    year: 'numeric',
    timeZone: 'UTC',
  });

  const wallets = await redis.smembers(KEYS.proWallets());
  console.log(`[WRAPPED CRON] generating for ${wallets.length} Pro wallets — ${yyyyMm}`);

  const results = { ok: 0, failed: 0 };

  for (const wallet of wallets) {
    try {
      await generateWrapped(wallet, year, month);

      const chatId = await getTelegramChatId(wallet);
      if (chatId) {
        const short = `${wallet.slice(0, 4)}…${wallet.slice(-4)}`;
        await sendTelegramMessage(
          chatId,
          `🎁 Your Rekt Wrapped for ${monthName} is live!\n\nrektreceipt.xyz/wrapped/${wallet}/${yyyyMm}\n\nTime to face the music, ${short}.`,
        );
      }

      results.ok++;
    } catch (err) {
      console.error(`[WRAPPED CRON] failed for ${wallet}:`, err);
      results.failed++;
    }
  }

  return NextResponse.json({ yyyyMm, wallets: wallets.length, ...results });
}
```

## Task 6: Server pages

- [ ] **Step 1: Create the redirect page `app/wrapped/[wallet]/page.tsx`**

```typescript
import { redis } from '@/lib/redis';
import { KEYS } from '@/lib/redis/keys';
import { redirect } from 'next/navigation';
import Link from 'next/link';

export default async function WrappedLatestPage({
  params,
}: {
  params: Promise<{ wallet: string }>;
}) {
  const { wallet } = await params;
  const latest = await redis.get<string>(KEYS.wrappedLatest(wallet));

  if (latest) {
    redirect(`/wrapped/${wallet}/${latest}`);
  }

  return (
    <main className="min-h-screen bg-[#0a0a0a] flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4 p-4 font-mono">
      <p className="text-[#00ff88] text-[10px] tracking-widest">REKT WRAPPED</p>
      <p className="text-white text-sm">No Wrapped generated yet.</p>
      <p className="text-[#6b7280] text-xs text-center max-w-xs">
        Rekt Wrapped is created for Pro wallets at the start of each month.
      </p>
      <Link
        href="/upgrade"
        className="mt-2 bg-[#00ff88] text-black font-bold px-5 py-2 rounded text-sm hover:bg-[#00e67a] transition-colors"
      >
        Upgrade to Pro
      </Link>
    </main>
  );
}
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Create `app/wrapped/[wallet]/[month]/page.tsx`**

```typescript
import { redis } from '@/lib/redis';
import { KEYS } from '@/lib/redis/keys';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { WrappedClient } from './WrappedClient';
import type { WrappedData } from '@/lib/wrapped';

export default async function WrappedMonthPage({
  params,
}: {
  params: Promise<{ wallet: string; month: string }>;
}) {
  const { wallet, month } = await params;
  const raw = await redis.get<string | WrappedData>(KEYS.wrapped(wallet, month));

  if (!raw) {
    return (
      <main className="min-h-screen bg-[#0a0a0a] flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4 p-4 font-mono">
        <p className="text-[#00ff88] text-[10px] tracking-widest">REKT WRAPPED</p>
        <p className="text-white text-sm">Wrapped not found for {month}.</p>
        <p className="text-[#6b7280] text-xs text-center max-w-xs">
          Rekt Wrapped is generated for Pro wallets on the 1st of each month.
        </p>
        <Link
          href="/upgrade"
          className="mt-2 bg-[#00ff88] text-black font-bold px-5 py-2 rounded text-sm hover:bg-[#00e67a] transition-colors"
        >
          Upgrade to Pro
        </Link>
      </main>
    );
  }

  const data: WrappedData = typeof raw === 'string' ? JSON.parse(raw) : raw;

  return <WrappedClient data={data} />;
}
```

- [ ] **Step 3: Verify TypeScript compiles**

```bash
npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20
```

Expected: error about missing `WrappedClient` — this is expected until Task 7. Confirm only that error appears and no others.

- [ ] **Step 4: Commit**

```bash
git add app/wrapped/
git commit -m "feat: add wrapped server pages with upgrade CTA fallback"
```

## Task 7: WrappedClient — cinematic slide deck

**Files:**
- Create: `app/wrapped/[wallet]/[month]/WrappedClient.tsx`

- [ ] **Step 1: Create `app/wrapped/[wallet]/[month]/WrappedClient.tsx`**

```typescript
'use client';

import { useState, useEffect, useRef, useCallback } from 'react';
import type { WrappedData } from '@/lib/wrapped';

interface Props {
  data: WrappedData;
}

const TOTAL_SLIDES = 9;

function formatMonthYear(year: number, month: number): string {
  return new Date(Date.UTC(year, month - 1, 1)).toLocaleString('en-US', {
    month: 'long',
    year: 'numeric',
    timeZone: 'UTC',
  });
}

function formatDate(ts: number): string {
  return new Date(ts * 1000).toLocaleDateString('en-GB', {
    day: '2-digit',
    month: 'short',
    year: 'numeric',
    timeZone: 'UTC',
  });
}

function formatTime(ts: number): string {
  return new Date(ts * 1000).toLocaleTimeString('en-GB', {
    hour: '2-digit',
    minute: '2-digit',
    timeZone: 'UTC',
  });
}

function ProgressBar({ current }: { current: number }) {
  return (
    <div className="absolute top-4 left-4 right-4 flex gap-1 z-10">
      {Array.from({ length: TOTAL_SLIDES }, (_, i) => (
        <div key={i} className="flex-1 h-0.5 bg-white/10 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
          <div
            className={`h-full rounded-full transition-all duration-300 ${
              i < current ? 'bg-white w-full' : i === current ? 'bg-white w-full' : 'w-0'
            }`}
          />
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

export function WrappedClient({ data }: Props) {
  const [current, setCurrent] = useState(0);
  const [feeDisplay, setFeeDisplay] = useState(0);
  const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false);
  const rafRef = useRef<number | null>(null);
  const startRef = useRef<number | null>(null);

  const monthLabel = formatMonthYear(data.year, data.month);
  const shortWallet = `${data.wallet.slice(0, 4)}…${data.wallet.slice(-4)}`;
  const yyyyMm = `${data.year}-${String(data.month).padStart(2, '0')}`;

  const animateFees = useCallback(() => {
    if (rafRef.current) cancelAnimationFrame(rafRef.current);
    startRef.current = null;
    setFeeDisplay(0);
    const target = data.totalFeesUsd;
    const duration = 1200;
    function tick(now: number) {
      if (!startRef.current) startRef.current = now;
      const t = Math.min((now - startRef.current) / duration, 1);
      const eased = 1 - Math.pow(1 - t, 3);
      setFeeDisplay(eased * target);
      if (t < 1) rafRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(tick);
    }
    rafRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(tick);
  }, [data.totalFeesUsd]);

  const goTo = useCallback(
    (idx: number) => {
      const next = Math.max(0, Math.min(TOTAL_SLIDES - 1, idx));
      setCurrent(next);
      if (next === 1) animateFees();
    },
    [animateFees],
  );

  useEffect(() => {
    function onKey(e: KeyboardEvent) {
      if (e.key === 'ArrowRight' || e.key === ' ') goTo(current + 1);
      if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') goTo(current - 1);
    }
    window.addEventListener('keydown', onKey);
    return () => window.removeEventListener('keydown', onKey);
  }, [current, goTo]);

  useEffect(() => {
    return () => {
      if (rafRef.current) cancelAnimationFrame(rafRef.current);
    };
  }, []);

  async function handleShare() {
    const url = `${window.location.origin}/wrapped/${data.wallet}/${yyyyMm}`;
    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(url);
    setCopied(true);
    setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 2000);
  }

  const slideClass = (idx: number) =>
    `absolute inset-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-center px-8 transition-all duration-400 ${
      idx === current
        ? 'opacity-100 scale-100 pointer-events-auto'
        : 'opacity-0 scale-95 pointer-events-none'
    }`;

  // Grade color
  const gradeColor =
    data.grade === 'S' || data.grade === 'A'
      ? '#00ff88'
      : data.grade === 'B' || data.grade === 'C'
      ? '#ffd700'
      : '#ff4444';

  return (
    <div className="relative w-full h-[100dvh] bg-[#0a0a0a] overflow-hidden font-mono select-none">
      <ProgressBar current={current} />

      {/* Tap zones */}
      <div
        className="absolute top-0 left-0 bottom-0 w-[45%] z-20 cursor-pointer"
        onClick={() => goTo(current - 1)}
      />
      <div
        className="absolute top-0 right-0 bottom-0 w-[45%] z-20 cursor-pointer"
        onClick={() => goTo(current + 1)}
      />

      {/* Arrow buttons — desktop only */}
      <button
        onClick={() => goTo(current - 1)}
        className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 z-30 hidden md:flex w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 items-center justify-center text-[#9ca3af] hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors"
      >
        ‹
      </button>
      <button
        onClick={() => goTo(current + 1)}
        className="absolute right-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 z-30 hidden md:flex w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 items-center justify-center text-[#9ca3af] hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors"
      >
        ›
      </button>

      {/* ── Slide 0: Intro ── */}
      <div
        className={slideClass(0)}
        style={{ background: 'linear-gradient(160deg, #0a0a0a 0%, #0f0005 60%, #0a0a0a 100%)' }}
      >
        <p className="text-[#ff444466] text-[9px] tracking-[5px] mb-5 uppercase">your rekt report</p>
        <p className="text-white text-2xl font-black mb-2">
          REKT<span className="text-[#ff4444]">RECEIPT</span>
        </p>
        <p className="text-[#6b7280] text-xs tracking-[3px] mb-8 uppercase">{monthLabel}</p>
        <div className="bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-[#9ca3af] text-xs">
          {shortWallet}
        </div>
        <p className="text-[#374151] text-[10px] mt-8 tracking-wide">time to face the music</p>
      </div>

      {/* ── Slide 1: Total Fees ── */}
      <div
        className={slideClass(1)}
        style={{ background: 'linear-gradient(160deg, #0a0a0a 0%, #1a0505 50%, #0a0a0a 100%)' }}
      >
        <p className="text-[#ff444488] text-[9px] tracking-[4px] mb-4 uppercase">this month you burned</p>
        <p
          className="text-white font-black leading-none mb-2"
          style={{ fontSize: 'clamp(48px, 12vw, 80px)', textShadow: '0 0 40px #ff444466, 0 0 80px #ff444422' }}
        >
          ${feeDisplay.toFixed(2)}
        </p>
        <div className="w-10 h-px my-4" style={{ background: 'linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #ff4444, transparent)' }} />
        <p className="text-[#ff4444] text-xs tracking-[2px] uppercase">in fees &amp; tips</p>
        <p className="text-[#4b5563] text-[10px] mt-2">that&apos;s not coming back</p>
      </div>

      {/* ── Slide 2: Grade ── */}
      <div
        className={slideClass(2)}
        style={{ background: 'linear-gradient(160deg, #0a0a0a 0%, #1a0000 50%, #0a0a0a 100%)' }}
      >
        <p className="text-[#ff444466] text-[9px] tracking-[4px] mb-6 uppercase">your execution grade</p>
        <p
          className="font-black leading-none"
          style={{
            fontSize: 'clamp(100px, 25vw, 160px)',
            color: gradeColor,
            textShadow: `0 0 60px ${gradeColor}88, 0 0 120px ${gradeColor}33`,
          }}
        >
          {data.grade}
        </p>
        <p className="text-[#6b7280] text-xs mt-4">
          {data.grade === 'F' ? 'Congratulations. Really.' : data.grade === 'D' ? 'Room for improvement.' : data.grade === 'C' ? 'Getting there.' : data.grade === 'B' ? 'Not bad, degen.' : 'You traded like an adult.'}
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* ── Slide 3: Worst Trade ── */}
      <div
        className={slideClass(3)}
        style={{ background: 'linear-gradient(160deg, #0a0a0a 0%, #150a00 50%, #0a0a0a 100%)' }}
      >
        <p className="text-[#ff880066] text-[9px] tracking-[4px] mb-5 uppercase">this is where it went wrong</p>
        {data.worstTrade ? (
          <>
            <p className="text-white font-black mb-2" style={{ fontSize: 'clamp(28px, 7vw, 48px)' }}>
              {data.worstTrade.symbol}
            </p>
            <p className="text-[#ff8800] font-bold text-xl">${data.worstTrade.feeUsd.toFixed(2)} in fees</p>
            <div className="w-10 h-px my-5" style={{ background: 'linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #ff8800, transparent)' }} />
            <p className="text-[#4b5563] text-[10px] tracking-wide uppercase">
              {formatDate(data.worstTrade.timestamp)} · {formatTime(data.worstTrade.timestamp)} UTC
            </p>
            <p className="text-[#6b7280] text-xs mt-3">your most expensive single swap</p>
          </>
        ) : (
          <p className="text-[#6b7280] text-sm">No swaps this month.</p>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* ── Slide 4: Dead Bags ── */}
      <div
        className={slideClass(4)}
        style={{ background: 'linear-gradient(160deg, #0a0a0a 0%, #0a0a00 50%, #0a0a0a 100%)' }}
      >
        <p className="text-[#ff880044] text-[9px] tracking-[4px] mb-5 uppercase">tokens bought, never sold</p>
        <p
          className="text-white font-black leading-none"
          style={{ fontSize: 'clamp(72px, 18vw, 100px)', textShadow: '0 0 40px #ff880044' }}
        >
          {data.deadTokens.length}
        </p>
        <p className="text-[#ff8800] text-xs tracking-[2px] mt-2 mb-5 uppercase">dead bags</p>
        <div className="w-10 h-px mb-5" style={{ background: 'linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #ff8800, transparent)' }} />
        {data.deadTokens.length > 0 && (
          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 justify-center max-w-xs">
            {data.deadTokens.slice(0, 6).map((t) => (
              <span
                key={t.mint}
                className="bg-white/5 border border-[#ff880022] rounded px-2 py-1 text-[#ff8800] text-[9px]"
              >
                {t.symbol}
              </span>
            ))}
            {data.deadTokens.length > 6 && (
              <span className="text-[#374151] text-[9px]">+ {data.deadTokens.length - 6} more</span>
            )}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* ── Slide 5: Personality ── */}
      <div
        className={slideClass(5)}
        style={{ background: 'linear-gradient(160deg, #0a0a0a 0%, #050a15 50%, #0a0a0a 100%)' }}
      >
        <p className="text-[#00ff8844] text-[9px] tracking-[4px] mb-5 uppercase">your trader type</p>
        <p
          className="font-black text-center leading-tight mb-3"
          style={{
            fontSize: 'clamp(22px, 5vw, 32px)',
            color: '#00ff88',
            textShadow: '0 0 30px #00ff8866',
          }}
        >
          {data.personality.type.toUpperCase()}
        </p>
        <div className="w-10 h-px my-4" style={{ background: 'linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #00ff88, transparent)' }} />
        <p className="text-[#6b7280] text-xs text-center max-w-[220px] leading-relaxed">
          {data.personality.description}
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* ── Slide 6: Percentile ── */}
      <div
        className={slideClass(6)}
        style={{ background: 'linear-gradient(160deg, #0a0a0a 0%, #0a0a1a 50%, #0a0a0a 100%)' }}
      >
        <p className="text-white/20 text-[9px] tracking-[4px] mb-5 uppercase">community rank</p>
        {data.communityPercentile !== null ? (
          <>
            <p className="text-white font-black leading-none text-center" style={{ fontSize: 'clamp(18px, 4vw, 24px)' }}>
              TOP
            </p>
            <p
              className="font-black leading-none"
              style={{ fontSize: 'clamp(80px, 20vw, 110px)', color: '#ff4444', textShadow: '0 0 40px #ff444444' }}
            >
              {Math.max(1, 100 - data.communityPercentile)}%
            </p>
            <div className="w-10 h-px my-4" style={{ background: 'linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #ffffff44, transparent)' }} />
            <p className="text-[#6b7280] text-xs text-center">
              more rekt than {data.communityPercentile}% of all audited wallets
            </p>
          </>
        ) : (
          <p className="text-[#6b7280] text-sm text-center">Not enough data yet.</p>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* ── Slide 7: Swap Count ── */}
      <div
        className={slideClass(7)}
        style={{ background: 'linear-gradient(160deg, #0a0a0a 0%, #001a0a 50%, #0a0a0a 100%)' }}
      >
        <p className="text-[#00ff8833] text-[9px] tracking-[4px] mb-5 uppercase">swaps this month</p>
        <p
          className="text-white font-black leading-none"
          style={{ fontSize: 'clamp(72px, 18vw, 100px)' }}
        >
          {data.swapCount.toLocaleString()}
        </p>
        <p className="text-[#00ff88] text-xs tracking-[2px] mt-2 mb-5 uppercase">transactions</p>
        <div className="w-10 h-px mb-4" style={{ background: 'linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #00ff88, transparent)' }} />
        <p className="text-[#374151] text-xs italic">
          {data.swapCount > 200 ? 'touch grass.' : data.swapCount > 100 ? 'a bit much.' : data.swapCount > 50 ? 'respectable, but still.' : 'you showed restraint.'}
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* ── Slide 8: Share ── */}
      <div
        className={slideClass(8)}
        style={{ background: 'linear-gradient(160deg, #0a0a0a 0%, #0f0a00 50%, #0a0a0a 100%)' }}
      >
        <p className="text-white/20 text-[9px] tracking-[4px] mb-5 uppercase">rekt wrapped · {yyyyMm}</p>
        <p className="text-white font-black text-xl text-center leading-tight mb-2">
          You survived.<br />Barely.
        </p>
        <p className="text-[#6b7280] text-[10px] mb-7">share your rekt story</p>
        <button
          onClick={handleShare}
          className="bg-[#ff4444] text-black font-black text-xs px-6 py-3 rounded tracking-wider hover:bg-[#ff6666] transition-colors"
        >
          {copied ? 'COPIED!' : 'SHARE MY WRAPPED →'}
        </button>
        <p className="text-[#374151] text-[9px] mt-5">
          rektreceipt.xyz/wrapped/{shortWallet}/{yyyyMm}
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

## Task 8: Manual smoke test

- [ ] **Step 1: Start the dev server**

```bash
npm run dev
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Seed a Wrapped for a known Pro wallet**

Using the existing dev-grant endpoint or Redis CLI, ensure a wallet has Pro status. Then call the cron manually:

```bash
curl -H "x-admin-secret: $ADMIN_SECRET" http://localhost:3000/api/cron/generate-wrapped
```

Expected response: `{"yyyyMm":"...","wallets":N,"ok":N,"failed":0}`

- [ ] **Step 3: Navigate to the Wrapped page**

Open `http://localhost:3000/wrapped/[wallet]/[YYYY-MM]` in a browser. Verify:
- All 9 slides render
- Tap zones work (left = back, right = forward)
- Arrow keys work
- Fees slide counts up when navigated to
- Grade slide renders with correct color
- Share button copies URL and shows "COPIED!"
- Page fills 100% of viewport height on both mobile and desktop viewport sizes

- [ ] **Step 4: Test the redirect**

Open `http://localhost:3000/wrapped/[wallet]` — should redirect to the `[YYYY-MM]` page.

- [ ] **Step 5: Test the not-found state**

Open `http://localhost:3000/wrapped/[wallet]/2099-01` — should show upgrade CTA, not a crash.

- [ ] **Step 6: Commit any fixes found during testing**

```bash
git add -p
git commit -m "fix: <describe what you fixed>"
```
